C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI review confirmed lifecycle_gate_definition coverage and authority boundaries. No P0/P1 findings; two P3 notes.

findings.title: Hermes evidence-only and HumanApproval non-delegable assertions are not inlined in lifecycle gate groups
findings.details: The contract preserves these boundaries through authority_boundary and entity sensitive_action_policy, but the lifecycle block itself is not fully self-contained.
findings.recommendation: Optionally inline an evidence-only note on hermes_validation and a non-delegable note on human_approval.

findings.title: Previous C00 review result cited a stale line number for lifecycle-transition P3
findings.details: The older artifact cited line 1215, while lifecycle allowed transitions are now around lines 1251-1384.
findings.recommendation: Refresh line anchors in regenerated review evidence.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI review completed. No P0/P1 findings; P2 findings, if any, are absent; P3 notes are recorded in adjudication and do not block this subphase.

review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json
